title: Sevappi
description: A five year kid who lives in a remote village in Tamilnadu imagines that, he has given birth to a Chicken. His love towards the chicken is limitless. All limitless emotions and scenarios involving them have faced a rough road, likewise the impeccable love of this 5 year boy happens to be the root cause of a family dispute, which later turns out to be a caste issue and then finally an issue on which the entire village fights upon.
